0DcSbN1MFQ.fact: One command per file in cmd/. Each cobra subcommand lives in its own file named after the command. Commands register themselves via init() { rootCmd.AddCommand(...) } — no central registry.

IbXqJaL5p9.fact: Title resolution (metadata → README → empty) is orchestrated in cmd/, not in internal/ packages. Each command has its own resolution logic — list uses latest-head-wins, future commands (edit, info) will differ. Don't move this orchestration into the project or metadata package.

bav5ZyElSL.fact: Adding/removing commands or flags? Update README.md and docs/link-system.md (for link flags).
